name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-mvj

metadata.name: tencentcloud-sdk-python-mvj
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Tencent Cloud Mvj SDK for Python

documentation:
# Tencent Cloud SDK for Python

Tencent Cloud Python Mvj SDK is the official software development kit, which allows Python developers to write software that makes use of Tencent Cloud services like CVM and CBS.
The SDK works on Python versions:

> - 2.7 and greater, including 3.x

## Quick Start

First, install the library:

```sh
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-common
$ pip install tencentcloud-sdk-python-mvj
```

or download source code from github and install:

```sh
$ git clone https://github.com/tencentcloud/tencentcloud-sdk-python.git
$ cd tencentcloud-sdk-python
$ python package.py --components common mvj
```

methods.name: tencentcloud.mvj.v20190926.mvj_client.MvjClient.MarketingValueJudgement
documentation:
欢迎使用营销价值判断（Marketing Value Judgement，简称 MVJ）。

营销价值判断（MVJ）是针对零售场景的风控服务，通过识别高价值顾客，以帮助零售商保障营销资金

```
param request

Request instance for MarketingValueJudgement.

type request



rtype

```
